title: pLVX-EF1α-mitoSRAI-IRES-Puro
author: O'Callaghan, Benjamin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: MitoSRAI cDNA was PCR and restriction digest cloned from mitoSRAI_pcDNA3 (Provided by the RIKEN BRC through the National BioResource Project of the MEXT, Japan; Cat# RDB18223) into pLVX-EF1α-IRES-Puro Vector (Takara Bio, Cat# 631988).
steps_raw: MitoSRAI cDNA was PCR and restriction digest cloned from mitoSRAI_pcDNA3 (Provided by the RIKEN BRC through the National BioResource Project of the MEXT, Japan; Cat# RDB18223) into pLVX-EF1α-IRES-Puro Vector (Takara Bio, Cat# 631988).
